name: Ukulethwa Kwezimo Eziphuthumayo
description: Ukuphathwa kokulethwa okunejubane noma okungahleliwe endaweni enzima.
steps: Misa umama olale phansi noma olale kancane. Ukutsheka kwezinhlangothi kwesokunxele kuyakhethwa uma uqulekile (kuvimbela ukucindezelwa kwe-aortocaval).
Lawula ukulethwa kwekhanda -- ukusekela ngesundu. UNGAdonsi.
Uma ikhanda selithunyelwe, hlola intambo ye-nuchal (emqaleni). Uma ikhona, shelela phezu kwekhanda. Uma kuqinile, qinisa futhi usike.
Munca umlomo bese ukhala ngesirinji ye-bulb uma ikhona.
Ukuqondisa ukulethwa kwehlombe elingaphambili ngokuhlehlisa okuthambile okuya phansi ekhanda, bese phezulu ukuze uthole ihlombe elingemuva.
Yomisa futhi ufudumale usana ngokushesha. Khuthaza ngokuhlikihla emhlane.
Bamba bese usika intambo (linda imizuzu engu-1-2 uma usana luzinzile).
Letha i-placenta ngokudonsa okulawulwayo okuthambile -- UNGAPHOQI.
Lawula i-oxytocin (uma ikhona) ukuze uvimbele ukopha kwangemva kokubeletha ngemva kokubeletha kwe-placenta.
Hlola ukopha kwangemva kokubeletha -- ukubhucungwa kwe-fundal, ukucindezela kwe-bimanual uma kudingeka.
Hlola amaphuzu e-Apgar ngomzuzu ongu-1 no-5.
warnings: Uma ukulethwa kungafiki -- UNGAZAMI. I-Rapid MEDEVAC iyakhethwa.
I-dystocia yamahlombe: uma amahlombe ebambekile, sebenzisa i-McRoberts maneuver (hyperflex hips) kanye ne-suprapubic pressure.
Ukopha kwangemva kokubeletha kuyimbangela ehamba phambili yokufa komama okungavinjelwa -- yiba ne-oxytocin isilungile.
